channel.title: NPR Topics: Politics
channel.description: NPR's expanded coverage of U.S. and world politics, the latest news from Congress and the White House and elections.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: U.S. military kills 6 in strike on alleged drug boat in the Eastern Pacific
item.description: Sunday's attack brought the death toll to at least 157 people since the Trump administration began targeting alleged drug-smuggling vessels, in early September.

img.alt: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth speaks during a press briefing at the Pentagon, Wednesday, March 4, 2026, in Washington.

content:encoded.p: Sunday's attack brought the death toll to at least 157 people since the Trump administration began targeting alleged drug-smuggling vessels, in early September.

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump says he won't sign bills until Congress overhauls voting
item.description: President Trump is pushing the Senate to abandon the filibuster and pass SAVE American Act, a bill top Democrat calls 'Jim Crow 2.0'

img.alt: President Donald Trump speaks to reporters while traveling aboard Air Force One en route from Dover Air Force Base, Del., to Miami, Saturday, March 7, 2026. (AP Photo/Mark Schiefelbein)

content:encoded.p: President Trump is pushing the Senate to abandon the filibuster and pass SAVE American Act, a bill top Democrat calls 'Jim Crow 2.0'

item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett

item.title: Retiring GOP Senator and Trump critic Thom Tillis hosts a dog parade on Capitol Hill
item.description: A recent dog parade on Capitol Hill was more than fluffy fun, it was also a chance for retiring Republican Sen. Thom Tillis to stretch his independent streak.

content:encoded.p: A recent dog parade on Capitol Hill was more than fluffy fun, it was also a chance for retiring Republican Sen. Thom Tillis to stretch his independent streak.

item.dc:creator: Sam Gringlas

item.title: Politics chat: Trump's plans for Iran and Cuba, Kristi Noem's ouster, Texas primaries
item.description: We look at the Trump administration's objectives in the war with Iran, as well as the ouster of Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem.

content:encoded.p: We look at the Trump administration's objectives in the war with Iran, as well as the ouster of Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem.

item.dc:creator: Ayesha Rascoe

item.title: A new Nepali party, led by an ex-rapper, is set for a landslide win in parliamentary election
item.description: A Nepali political party led by an ex-rapper is set for a landslide victory in the country's first parliamentary election since Gen Z protests ousted the old leadership that has ruled the Himalayan nation for decades.

img.alt: Balendra Shah, foreground, former mayor of Kathmandu Metropolitan City and prime ministerial candidate of the Rastriya Swatantra Party, arrives to receive his victory certificate after defeating former Prime Minister Khadga Prasad Oli of the Communist Party of Nepal–Unified Marxist-Leninist (CPN-UML) in Jhapa, about 267 miles (430 kilometers) southeast of Kathmandu, Nepal, Sunday, March 8, 2026.

content:encoded.p: A Nepali political party led by an ex-rapper is set for a landslide victory in the country's first parliamentary election since Gen Z protests ousted the old leadership that has ruled the Himalayan nation for decades.

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. Judge says Kari Lake broke law in overseeing Voice of America
item.description: He declared all of Lake's actions over the past year to be null and void, including the layoffs of more than 1,000 journalists and staffers.

img.alt: Kari Lake, senior adviser for the U.S. Agency for Global Media, departs following a House Committee on House Administration hearing on federal elections on Capitol Hill, Tuesday, Feb. 10, 2026, in Washington.

content:encoded.p: He declared all of Lake's actions over the past year to be null and void, including the layoffs of more than 1,000 journalists and staffers.

item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik

item.title: Trump vows to 'take care of Cuba,' praises Venezuela cooperation at summit
item.description: Trump made the promise in front of an assembled meeting of Latin American leaders.

img.alt: President Trump signs a proclamation committing to countering cartel criminal activity at the Shield of the Americas Summit.

content:encoded.p: Trump made the promise in front of an assembled meeting of Latin American leaders.

item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: Jan. 6 plaque honoring police officers is now displayed at the Capitol after a 3-year delay
item.description: Visitors to the Capitol in Washington now have a visible reminder of the siege there on Jan. 6, 2021, and the officers who fought and were injured that day.

img.alt: A plaque honoring police service on Jan. 6, 2021 at the Capitol, Saturday, March 7, 2026, in Washington.

content:encoded.p: Visitors to the Capitol in Washington now have a visible reminder of the siege there on Jan. 6, 2021, and the officers who fought and were injured that day.

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Week in Politics: Trump's messaging on Iran war; MAGA base reaction; new DHS leadership
item.description: Messaging from the Trump Administration over the war on Iran has been mixed and confused. There are tensions in the MAGA base over the war. Plus, a new Secretary of Homeland Security is in the works.

content:encoded.p: Messaging from the Trump Administration over the war on Iran has been mixed and confused. There are tensions in the MAGA base over the war. Plus, a new Secretary of Homeland Security is in the works.

item.dc:creator: Scott Simon

item.title: Trump warns Iran 'will be hit very hard' as war enters its second week
item.description: Trump warned Saturday that Iran would soon "be hit very hard," adding that the U.S. may expand its target list to "new areas and groups of people."

content:encoded.p: Trump warned Saturday that Iran would soon "be hit very hard," adding that the U.S. may expand its target list to "new areas and groups of people."

item.dc:creator: Juliana Kim
